text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The spring G1 races are underway. First, Kitasan
Black will be running the Osaka Hai. After her,
Satono Diamond will take on the Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After her good performance at the long distance
Kikuka Sho and Arima Kinen, people wonder if
the Osaka Hai is too short for Kitasan Black, but
she ignores them and makes for the track.
